ValidationRule.description: Director Approval is required before Status can be set to Pending Compliance Review.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Partner_Affiliate_Form', NOT(Partner_Team_Director_Approval__c)), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Client_Form', NOT(Client_Solution_Director_Approval__c)) ), ISCHANGED(Form_Response_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Form_Response_Status__c, 'Pending Compliance Review') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The status may be updated to "Pending Compliance Review" only when the Director Approval checkbox has been selected.
